headline: UBS and Jefferies Lower Views on Medtronic (MDT) Amid Diabetes Unit Changes
summary: With an annual dividend yield of 3.41%, Medtronic plc (NYSE:MDT) is included among the 10 Best High-Yield Dividend Growth Stocks to Buy Right Now. On April 22, UBS lowered the firm’s price recommendation on Medtronic plc (NYSE:MDT) to $90 from $104. It reiterated a Neutral rating on the shares. The firm updated its model to reflect […]

headline: Middle East and Africa Continuous Glucose Monitoring Market Forecast and Company Analysis Report 2026-2034 Featuring Dexcom, Medtronic, Senseonics, Abbott Diabetes Care, and GlySens
summary: The Middle East and Africa Continuous Glucose Monitoring (CGM) market is set for growth, driven by increasing diabetes rates, technological advancements, and healthcare awareness. Projected to rise from USD 320.44 million in 2025 to USD 855.30 million by 2034 at an 11.53% CAGR, this market benefits from enhanced healthcare infrastructure and digital health integration.
